scripts.build: cd Frontend && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.test: echo "Run 'npm run test:backend' to test the backend API" && exit 0
scripts.test:backend: cd Backend/server && node -e "import('./index.js').catch(()=>{})" & sleep 3 && curl -sf http://localhost:4000/api/health && echo 'Backend OK'
scripts.install:all: cd Frontend && npm install && cd ../Backend/server && npm install
